results.title: Chief secretary launches innovative solar and battery system at Melanesian Haus
results.description: Chief Secretary to the Government, Mr Ivan Pomaleu, has officially launched the new solar grid and solar-class Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) for the Department of the Prime Minister and National Executive Council (NEC) today at Melanesian Haus. The post Chief secretary launches innovative solar and battery system at Melanesian Haus appeared first on Post Courier .

results.title: Fuel Prices Rise Again; Petrol, Diesel Costlier by Up to 94 Paise Per Litre
results.description: New Delhi: Petrol and diesel prices were increased once again across major metropolitan cities on Saturday, marking the third hike in less than 10 days amid continued volatility in global crude oil markets. In Delhi, petrol prices climbed by 87 paise to Rs 99.51 per litre, while diesel rates rose by 91 paise to Rs [...] The post Fuel Prices Rise Again; Petrol, Diesel Costlier by Up to 94 Paise Per Litre first appeared on THE ARYAVARTH EXPRESS - YOUR OWN ENGLISH DAILY NEWS PORTAL .
